<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshworkspace.v2.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshplatforms-66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385486549215"},"examples":{"meshWorkspacePost":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v2\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshWorkspace\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"my-workspace\",\n    \"tags\": {\n      \"environment\": [\"production\"],\n      \"team\": [\"platform\"]\n    }\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"displayName\": \"My Workspace\",\n    \"platformBuilderAccessEnabled\": true\n  }\n}"}}}}}}

  id={undefined}
